source_rationale: KRT17 is a basal/squamous cytokeratin strongly associated with aberrant basaloid differentiation in lung
KRT7 is a simple epithelial keratin marking aberrant basaloid cells with mixed basal-luminal identity
KRT8 is a luminal cytokeratin co-expressed with basal keratins in aberrant basaloid cells
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells associated with fibrotic lung disease
ITGB6 encodes integrin beta-6, a TGF-beta activating integrin characteristic of aberrant basaloid cells in IPF
LAMC2 encodes laminin gamma-2, a basement membrane component upregulated in aberrant basaloid cells
GDF15 is a stress-responsive cytokine highly expressed in aberrant basaloid cells in fibrotic lung
CDH1 (E-cadherin) marks the epithelial identity of aberrant basaloid cells
SOX4 is a developmental transcription factor associated with progenitor-like aberrant basaloid state
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface antigen enriched in aberrant basaloid cells
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein that is a canonical marker of alveolar macrophages
MARCO is a scavenger receptor highly specific to alveolar macrophages for pathogen clearance
MSR1 (CD204) is a macrophage scavenger receptor enriched in alveolar macrophages
PPARG is a transcription factor essential for alveolar macrophage differentiation and lipid metabolism
MRC1 (CD206) is a mannose receptor characteristic of tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in lipid-laden alveolar macrophages
C1QA is a complement component produced by alveolar macrophages for immune surveillance
C1QB is a complement subunit co-expressed with C1QA as a hallmark of tissue macrophages
CCL18 is a chemokine preferentially secreted by alveolar macrophages in the lung
APOE is involved in lipid metabolism and is highly expressed in alveolar macrophages
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 (AT1) cells in the lung
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly enriched in AT1 cells
CAV1 (caveolin-1) is essential for AT1 cell caveolae formation and gas exchange
HOPX is a transcription factor that is a well-established AT1 cell marker
CLDN18 is a tight junction protein specific to alveolar epithelial cells, enriched in AT1
RTKN2 is a recently identified specific marker of human AT1 cells
CLIC5 is a chloride channel enriched in AT1 cells involved in fluid homeostasis
CAV2 co-localizes with CAV1 in AT1 cell caveolae and marks these thin gas-exchange cells
SFTPC (surfactant protein C) is the canonical and most specific marker of AT2 cells
SFTPB (surfactant protein B) is essential for surfactant function and highly expressed in AT2 cells
SFTPA1 (surfactant protein A1) is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate immunity
SFTPA2 (surfactant protein A2) is co-expressed with SFTPA1 in AT2 cells
SFTPD (surfactant protein D) is a collectin secreted by AT2 cells for host defense
NAPSA (napsin A) is an aspartyl protease involved in surfactant processing in AT2 cells
ABCA3 is a lipid transporter in lamellar bodies essential for surfactant packaging in AT2 cells
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) marks lamellar bodies in AT2 cells and is a specific AT2 marker
SLC34A2 is a phosphate transporter highly expressed in AT2 cells for surfactant phospholipid synthesis
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor produced by AT2 cells for epithelial defense
MS4A1 (CD20) is the canonical B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
CD79A is a component of the B cell receptor complex essential for B cell signaling
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
EBF1 is a transcription factor essential for B cell lineage commitment and development
BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B cells
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor critical for mature B cell maintenance
BCL11A is a transcription factor required for B cell development
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
KRT17 is a canonical basal cell cytokeratin in airway epithelium
KRT5 is the definitive basal cell keratin used to identify airway basal cells
KRT15 is a basal cell keratin marking progenitor basal cells in the airway
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in airway basal cells
MIR205HG hosts miR-205, a well-known basal cell-specific microRNA in stratified epithelia
ITGA2 (integrin alpha-2) mediates basal cell adhesion to the basement membrane
EGFR is highly expressed in basal cells driving proliferation and self-renewal
AQP3 is an aquaporin enriched in airway basal cells
DNAH12 encodes a dynein axonemal heavy chain essential for ciliary motility
RSPH1 is a radial spoke head protein essential for ciliary motility
CAPS (calcyphosine) is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in ciliated cells
TPPP3 is a tubulin polymerization promoting protein specific to ciliated cells
DNAH9 is an outer dynein arm heavy chain essential for ciliary beating
DNAH5 is a dynein heavy chain whose mutations cause primary ciliary dyskinesia
HYDIN is a central pair protein required for ciliary motility
CFAP299 is a cilia and flagella associated protein marking ciliated cells
CDHR3 is a cadherin-related protein expressed on ciliated airway cells and rhinovirus receptor
RFX3 is a transcription factor that regulates ciliogenesis gene expression
S100A8 is a calcium-binding alarmin that is a canonical marker of classical monocytes
S100A9 forms calprotectin with S100A8 and is highly specific to classical monocytes
VCAN (versican) is a proteoglycan highly expressed in classical monocytes
FCN1 (ficolin-1) is a pattern recognition molecule specific to classical monocytes
S100A12 is a calcium-binding protein highly specific to classical monocytes
THBS1 (thrombospondin-1) is upregulated in activated classical monocytes
IL1R2 is a decoy IL-1 receptor enriched in classical monocytes
SCGB3A2 is a secretoglobin that is a canonical marker of club cells in the airway
SCGB1A1 (CC10/CC16) is the definitive club cell secretory protein
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin family member expressed in club cells
SFTPB is expressed in club cells in addition to AT2 cells for airway surfactant production

ID2 is a transcription factor required for cDC1 development

CSF2RA (GM-CSF receptor alpha) is expressed on cDC2s for DC survival and activation

AXL is a receptor tyrosine kinase marking a subset of cDC2s
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly expressed by cytotoxic T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in CD8+ cytotoxic T cells
GZMB (granzyme B) is a serine protease in cytotoxic granules of CD8+ T cells
CD8A is the canonical co-receptor defining cytotoxic T cells
CD3D is a T cell receptor complex component confirming T cell identity
GNLY (granulysin) is an antimicrobial protein in cytotoxic T cell granules
PRF1 (perforin) is essential for cytotoxic T cell-mediated target cell lysis
RUNX3 is a transcription factor required for CD8+ T cell differentiation
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic T cells
CD1A is the canonical marker of Langerhans cells for lipid antigen presentation
S100B is a calcium-binding protein highly specific to Langerhans-type dendritic cells

FCER1A is the high-affinity IgE receptor alpha chain expressed on Langerhans cells

ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase highly expressed on Langerhans cells

DCN (decorin) is a proteoglycan that is a canonical fibroblast marker
COL1A2 encodes collagen type I alpha-2, a major extracellular matrix product of fibroblasts
CFD (complement factor D/adipsin) is highly expressed in lung fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an ECM glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
LUM (lumican) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts

SFRP2 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in fibroblast populations

C3 complement component is produced by lung fibroblasts as part of local immunity
PLA2G2A is a phospholipase enriched in lung fibroblasts
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin highly expressed in goblet and secretory airway cells
SCGB1A1 is a secretory protein expressed in goblet cells of the airway
BPIFB1 is a bactericidal protein specific to mucus-secreting goblet cells

LCN2 (lipocalin-2) is an antimicrobial protein secreted by goblet cells
AGR2 is a protein disulfide isomerase essential for mucin folding in goblet cells
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor highly expressed in goblet cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on ILC subsets with cytotoxic function
GNLY (granulysin) indicates cytotoxic capacity of this ILC subset
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule marker expressed in NK-like ILCs
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor expressed on ILC1/NK-like cells
KLRC4-KLRK1 (NKG2D) is an activating receptor on ILCs for target recognition
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILCs to recruit dendritic cells
XCL2 is a chemokine co-expressed with XCL1 in ILCs
CD7 is expressed on ILCs and NK cells as a lymphoid lineage marker
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by ILCs for tissue repair
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker of ILC2s and ILC3s
AREG (amphiregulin) is a key effector cytokine of ILC2s for tissue repair
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on ILC2s and required for their development
ID2 is a transcription factor essential for all ILC lineage development
KIT (CD117) is expressed on ILC2s and ILC3s
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is expressed on activated ILC2s
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILCs
RUNX2 is a transcription factor associated with ILC2 identity
FOXI1 is the master transcription factor defining ionocyte identity in the airway
ASCL3 is a transcription factor required for ionocyte differentiation

CCL21 is a chemokine canonically produced by lymphatic endothelial cells to guide immune cell trafficking
